_comment: Filter codes excluded from NovaCat photometry ingestion. These represent non-standard observation modes that are not usable as calibrated photometry. Keys are exact, case-sensitive filter strings. See: ADR-016, Decision 5.
_maintenance_note: Before adding entries, cross-check the filter string against the SVO Filter Profile Service (https://svo2.cab.inta-csic.es/theory/fps/) to confirm it does not correspond to a legitimate registered filter.
